_schema: Locked-in animal routes per location. Full-precision floats from the v2 / v3 summary JSONs — do not round, the route is sensitive to lat/lon snap-to-nearest-node. v3 (S163 follow-up) switched template to ELE-S04 at user pick, bumped n_waypoints 32 → 64, fixed the waypoint-snap-to-distinct-node dedup bug in router.py, dropped scale to 3-4km for ~45km routes. User accepted v3 s04_xs despite a known artifact (small back-ear spike around waypoint 43); see compare.html for the smoothed alternative that was rejected.

router._notes: revisit_penalty_m=0 lets each leg/trunk splice loop trace as a clean out-and-back. n_waypoints=64 plus snap-to-distinct-node (KDTree, k=50) gives each leg multiple distinct OSM-node targets so Dijkstra has to dive in. See lessons_elephant_lockin_config.md for the override-Optuna pattern and the sister skill `gps-art-splice-loop-template-routing`.

search._notes: Length penalty off; rotation clipped near canonical orientation; scale 3-4 km for ~40-47 km routes. Template smoothing OFF in the locked version — user prefers the higher iou (0.32) over the smoother cleaner outline (0.31).

elephant_st_albans._known_artifacts: Small upward spike around waypoint 43 on the back; that's the elephant's ear in the template, faithfully traced. User accepted; see compare.html.
